reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the two README Core Flow claims covered by the external consumer onboarding smoke and packet-backed readable renderer tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names install and repo-materialization behavior that can be proven by deterministic external consumer onboarding smoke.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the external consumer onboarding smoke: `cautilus init` installs `.agents/skills/cautilus-agent/SKILL.md`, creates the `.claude/skills` compatibility symlink, initializes an adapter, reaches doctor ready, and completes one bounded fixture run.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep init install proof aligned with the repo-local Cautilus Agent path and Claude compatibility shim.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet shape, durable outputs, and readable views that can be proven by deterministic CLI command execution and renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the external consumer onboarding smoke producing eval-cases.json, eval-observed.json, and eval-summary.json, plus readable renderer tests proving packet/source-backed Markdown, browser, and HTML views preserve JSON packets as the audit source.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep README Core Flow reviewable-artifact wording aligned with eval packet outputs and the reviewable artifact projection matrix.
